name: dtc-mastery
description: Complete DTC e-commerce knowledge engine covering product ideation, brand strategy, sourcing, product development, quality control, logistics, Shopify store setup, Amazon listing optimization, Amazon PPC, TikTok Shop, launch strategy, pricing and finance, influencer marketing, operations and scaling, and legal/exit planning. Built from 9 extraction files covering Gretta Van Riel, Jason Wong, Matt Clark, Melisa Vong, Kian Golzari, Kevin King summit speakers, Incrementum Digital, Escala Academy, and Michelle (TikTok Shop).
